title: Create a log (or export) all internal notes - is it possible?
excerpt: I would like the ability to report on all interactions with contacts for my employer’s reporting requirements. I’ve been recording those interactions as internal notes. I’m able to export all contacts but can’t find a wa…

posts.author: fiona.czuczman (Fiona Czuczman)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like the ability to report on all interactions with contacts for my employer’s reporting requirements. I’ve been recording those interactions as internal notes. I’m able to export all contacts but can’t find a way to include internal notes within the export.

Is there another way of doing this? Thanks.

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@fiona.czuczman ,
Yes, there is another way to report on all interactions with contacts for your employer’s reporting requirements, even if you’ve been recording those interactions as internal notes.
You can use use Make This apps allow you to connect Monday.com with other apps and services, and automate tasks such as exporting data.

posts.author: fiona.czuczman (Fiona Czuczman)
posts.cookedHtml: Just checking, do you mean it will also export the internal notes with the contacts?
